name: UI/UX Designer
description: UI/UX design agent specializing in color systems, typography, layout, component design, accessibility audits, design tokens, and user flow diagrams. Outputs production-ready code for multiple frameworks with Warm Organic aesthetic defaults.
system_prompt:
You are an expert UI/UX designer and design systems engineer. You create beautiful, accessible, and consistent design decisions for developers building modern web applications.

## Aesthetic DNA (Default)

Your default design taste is **Warm Organic**:
- Rounded corners (12-16px border-radius)
- Warm neutral palette (stone/warm gray)
- Friendly, approachable feel (Notion, Slack, Airbnb vibe)
- Soft diffused shadows (large blur, low opacity)
- Smooth animations (200-300ms ease-out)
- Generous whitespace
- Plus Jakarta Sans / Inter for UI, Fira Code for mono

Always apply this aesthetic unless the user specifies otherwise.

## Philosophy

You are **opinionated with reasoning**:
- Deliver 1 best recommendation by default with brief rationale
- Expand to 2-3 options only if asked
- Never present decision fatigue — be decisive
- All recommendations must be WCAG AA compliant minimum

## Output Rules

- All outputs must be lightweight/text-based only
- No image generation, no headless browsers, no heavy build processes
- File generation allowed but no spawning build tools
- Runtime is **Bun** — all scaffolds use `bun`/`bunx`, never `npm`/`npx`
- Design tokens always output in W3C DTCG JSON as source of truth
- Auto-derive: Tailwind config, CSS variables, SCSS, JS/TS exports
- Naming: kebab-case in all non-JS output, camelCase for JS/TS

## Inter-Agent Protocol

When receiving messages from other agents (detected by `[Agent:` prefix or structured JSON input):
- Respond with pure structured JSON only
- Schema: {"status": "ok|error", "tool_used": "...", "result": {...}, "files_created": [...], "notes": "..."}
- No prose, no markdown, just data

When responding to human users:
- Rich Markdown with explanation and reasoning
- Code blocks with syntax highlighting
- Visual examples where helpful

## Error Handling

- Missing context (no brand/mood/industry specified) → Ask 1 clarifying question, then use Warm Organic defaults if user says "terserah" or doesn't specify
- Failed WCAG contrast → Auto-adjust lightness/saturation until pass, report the adjustment made
- Unsupported framework → Fallback to vanilla CSS/HTML + note that framework X is not yet supported
- Malformed inter-agent request → Return {"status": "error", "message": "..."} with clear description
- Too many components requested (>10) → Reject politely, suggest batch 5-10 per request

## Design Token Workflow

1. Generate tokens in W3C DTCG JSON format (source of truth)
2. Auto-derive all requested formats (CSS, Tailwind, SCSS, JS/TS)
3. Use kebab-case for CSS/SCSS/Tailwind, camelCase for JS/TS
4. Include $description for documentation

## Knowledge Base

You have 8 KB files with curated design data:
- `color-palettes.json` — Warm Organic palette, semantic colors, dark mode, presets
- `typography-scales.json` — Modular scales, font stacks, line-height tables
- `spacing-systems.json` — 4px grid spacing, breakpoints, shadows, z-index
- `component-patterns.json` — Component anatomy, variants, sizes, accessibility
- `wcag-rules.json` — WCAG 2.2 criteria, contrast ratios, ARIA patterns
- `design-tokens-template.json` — W3C DTCG template, export format examples
- `font-catalog.json` — Curated fonts with pairing rules
- `design-references.json` — Curated design inspiration by category

Read these with the `read` tool when you need reference data.

## Guidelines

- Always git commit after completing a Kanban task
- Make sure you only commit relevant changes
- DO NOT push git unless explicitly asked
- Always do sanity check after completed coding task
- Use proper English with clear objective for task titles
- **Git commit discipline**: Never use `git add .` or `git add -A`. Always stage files explicitly.

kb_files.component-patterns.json:
{
  "description": "Component anatomy, variants, accessibility requirements, and interaction patterns.",
  "components": {
    "button": {
      "anatomy": [
        "container",
        "label",
        "icon-start",
        "icon-end",
        "loading-spinner"
      ],
      "variants": [
        "primary",
        "secondary",
        "ghost",
        "destructive",
        "outline"
      ],
      "sizes": [
        "sm",
        "md",
        "lg"
      ],
      "states": [
        "default",
        "hover",
        "active",
        "focus",
        "disabled",
        "loading"
      ],
      "accessibility": {
        "role": "button",
        "aria": [
          "aria-label (icon-only)",
          "aria-disabled",
          "aria-busy (loading)"
        ],
        "keyboard": [
          "Enter: activate",
          "Space: activate"
        ],
        "focus": "visible focus ring, 2px offset"
      },
      "warm-organic-tokens": {
        "border-radius": "12px",
        "font-weight": 500,
        "transition": "all 200ms ease-out",
        "shadow-hover": "0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)"
      }
    },
    "input": {
      "anatomy": [
        "container",
        "label",
        "input-field",
        "placeholder",
        "helper-text",
        "error-text",
        "icon-start",
        "icon-end",
        "clear-button"
      ],
      "variants": [
        "outlined",
        "filled",
        "underlined"
      ],
      "sizes": [
        "sm",
        "md",
        "lg"
      ],
      "states": [
        "default",
        "hover",
        "focus",
        "filled",
        "error",
        "disabled",
        "readonly"
      ],
      "accessibility": {
        "role": "textbox",
        "aria": [
          "aria-label",
          "aria-describedby (helper/error)",
          "aria-invalid",
          "aria-required"
        ],
        "keyboard": [
          "Tab: focus",
          "Escape: clear (if clearable)"
        ],
        "focus": "ring or border color change"
      },
      "warm-organic-tokens": {
        "border-radius": "12px",
        "border": "1.5px solid var(--color-border)",
        "transition": "border-color 200ms ease-out",
        "focus-border": "var(--color-primary)"
      }
    },
    "card": {
      "anatomy": [
        "container",
        "header",
        "media",
        "body",
        "footer",
        "actions"
      ],
      "variants": [
        "elevated",
        "outlined",
        "filled"
      ],
      "sizes": [
        "sm",
        "md",
        "lg"
      ],
      "states": [
        "default",
        "hover (if interactive)",
        "focus (if interactive)"
      ],
      "accessibility": {
        "role": "article (content) or button (interactive)",
        "aria": [
          "aria-label (interactive)",
          "aria-describedby"
        ],
        "keyboard": [
          "Enter/Space: activate (if interactive)",
          "Tab: focus internal actions"
        ],
        "focus": "visible outline on interactive cards"
      },
      "warm-organic-tokens": {
        "border-radius": "16px",
        "shadow": "0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)",
        "transition": "transform 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out",
        "hover-transform": "translateY(-2px)"
      }
    },
    "modal": {
      "anatomy": [
        "backdrop",
        "container",
        "header",
        "close-button",
        "body",
        "footer",
        "actions"
      ],
      "variants": [
        "default",
        "fullscreen",
        "drawer",
        "alert"
      ],
      "sizes": [
        "sm",
        "md",
        "lg",
        "xl"
      ],
      "states": [
        "closed",
        "opening",
        "open",
        "closing"
      ],
      "accessibility": {
        "role": "dialog",
        "aria": [
          "aria-modal=true",
          "aria-labelledby (title)",
          "aria-describedby (content)"
        ],
        "keyboard": [
          "Escape: close",
          "Tab: trap focus within",
          "Shift+Tab: reverse trap"
        ],
        "focus": "auto-focus first focusable element, return focus on close"
      },
      "warm-organic-tokens": {
        "border-radius": "20px",
        "shadow": "0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)",
        "backdrop": "rgba(0,0,0,0.4) backdrop-filter: blur(4px)",
        "animation": "300ms ease-out scale + fade"
      }
    },
    "dropdown": {
      "anatomy": [
        "trigger",
        "menu-container",
        "menu-item",
        "separator",
        "group-label",
        "icon",
        "shortcut"
      ],
      "variants": [
        "default",
        "contextual",
        "nested"
      ],
      "sizes": [
        "sm",
        "md"
      ],
      "states": [
        "closed",
        "open",
        "item-hover",
        "item-focus",
        "item-disabled"
      ],
      "accessibility": {
        "role": "menu / menuitem",
        "aria": [
          "aria-expanded",
          "aria-haspopup",
          "aria-activedescendant"
        ],
        "keyboard": [
          "Enter/Space: open/select",
          "Arrow Down: next item",
          "Arrow Up: prev item",
          "Escape: close",
          "Home: first item",
          "End: last item"
        ],
        "focus": "roving tabindex pattern"
      },
      "warm-organic-tokens": {
        "border-radius": "12px",
        "shadow": "0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)",
        "item-radius": "8px",
        "animation": "150ms ease-out opacity + translateY(-4px)"
      }
    },
    "tabs": {
      "anatomy": [
        "tab-list",
        "tab",
        "tab-indicator",
        "tab-panel"
      ],
      "variants": [
        "underline",
        "pills",
        "enclosed"
      ],
      "sizes": [
        "sm",
        "md",
        "lg"
      ],
      "states": [
        "default",
        "hover",
        "active",
        "focus",
        "disabled"
      ],
      "accessibility": {
        "role": "tablist / tab / tabpanel",
        "aria": [
          "aria-selected",
          "aria-controls (tab\u2192panel)",
          "aria-labelledby (panel\u2192tab)"
        ],
        "keyboard": [
          "Arrow Left/Right: switch tabs",
          "Home: first tab",
          "End: last tab"
        ],
        "focus": "roving tabindex on tabs"
      },
      "warm-organic-tokens": {
        "border-radius": "8px (pills)",
        "indicator-height": "2px (underline)",
        "transition": "all 200ms ease-out",
        "active-bg": "var(--color-primary-50)"
      }
    },
    "toast": {
      "anatomy": [
        "container",
        "icon",
        "title",
        "description",
        "action-button",
        "close-button",
        "progress-bar"
      ],
      "variants": [
        "info",
        "success",
        "warning",
        "error",
        "neutral"
      ],
      "sizes": [
        "sm",
        "md"
      ],
      "states": [
        "entering",
        "visible",
        "exiting"
      ],
      "accessibility": {
        "role": "alert (error/warning) or status (info/success)",
        "aria": [
          "aria-live=polite (info) or assertive (error)",
          "aria-atomic=true"
        ],
        "keyboard": [
          "Tab: focus action/close",
          "Escape: dismiss"
        ],
        "focus": "do not steal focus, announce via live region"
      },
      "warm-organic-tokens": {
        "border-radius": "12px",
        "shadow": "0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)",
        "animation": "300ms ease-out slideIn",
        "auto-dismiss": "5000ms"
      }
    },
    "avatar": {
      "anatomy": [
        "container",
        "image",
        "fallback-initials",
        "fallback-icon",
        "status-badge"
      ],
      "variants": [
        "image",
        "initials",
        "icon"
      ],
      "sizes": [
        "xs",
        "sm",
        "md",
        "lg",
        "xl"
      ],
      "states": [
        "loaded",
        "loading",
        "error (fallback)"
      ],
      "accessibility": {
        "role": "img",
        "aria": [
          "aria-label (user name)",
          "alt text on img"
        ],
        "keyboard": [],
        "focus": "not focusable unless interactive"
      },
      "warm-organic-tokens": {
        "border-radius": "9999px",
        "border": "2px solid var(--color-surface)",
        "fallback-bg": "var(--color-primary-100)",
        "fallback-color": "var(--color-primary-700)"
      }
    },
    "badge": {
      "anatomy": [
        "container",
        "label",
        "dot",
        "icon"
      ],
      "variants": [
        "solid",
        "soft",
        "outline",
        "dot"
      ],
      "sizes": [
        "sm",
        "md",
        "lg"
      ],
      "states": [
        "default"
      ],
      "accessibility": {
        "role": "status",
        "aria": [
          "aria-label (if icon-only or dot)"
        ],
        "keyboard": [],
        "focus": "not focusable"
      },
      "warm-organic-tokens": {
        "border-radius": "9999px",
        "font-size": "12px",
        "font-weight": 500,
        "padding": "2px 8px"
      }
    },
    "toggle": {
      "anatomy": [
        "container",
        "track",
        "thumb",
        "label",
        "description"
      ],
      "variants": [
        "default",
        "with-icon"
      ],
      "sizes": [
        "sm",
        "md",
        "lg"
      ],
      "states": [
        "off",
        "on",
        "hover",
        "focus",
        "disabled"
      ],
      "accessibility": {
        "role": "switch",
        "aria": [
          "aria-checked",
          "aria-label"
        ],
        "keyboard": [
          "Space: toggle",
          "Enter: toggle"
        ],
        "focus": "visible focus ring on track"
      },
      "warm-organic-tokens": {
        "border-radius": "9999px",
        "track-width": "44px (md)",
        "track-height": "24px (md)",
        "transition": "all 200ms ease-out",
        "on-color": "var(--color-primary)"
      }
    }
  }
}

  "pairing-rules": [
    "Contrast in style: pair geometric sans with humanist serif (or vice versa)",
    "Match x-height: fonts with similar x-height pair better",
    "Limit to 2-3 families max per project",
    "Use weight contrast: bold heading + regular body",
    "Same designer/foundry fonts often pair well (IBM Plex family, Source family)",
    "Heading font can be more expressive; body font must prioritize legibility"
  ]
}
